verifications.command: ref_out=$(mktemp); ref_err=$(mktemp); dnsdomainname >"$ref_out" 2>"$ref_err"; ref_code=$?; sys_out=$(mktemp); sys_err=$(mktemp); printf '%s' "$CMD_STDOUT" >"$sys_out"; printf '%s' "$CMD_STDERR" >"$sys_err"; cmp -s "$sys_out" "$ref_out" && cmp -s "$sys_err" "$ref_err" && test "$CMD_EXIT_CODE" = "$ref_code"

ref_out=$(mktemp); ref_err=$(mktemp); dnsdomainname -f >"$ref_out" 2>"$ref_err"; ref_code=$?; sys_out=$(mktemp); sys_err=$(mktemp); printf '%s' "$CMD_STDOUT" >"$sys_out"; printf '%s' "$CMD_STDERR" >"$sys_err"; cmp -s "$sys_out" "$ref_out" && cmp -s "$sys_err" "$ref_err" && test "$CMD_EXIT_CODE" = "$ref_code"
